case_title: CINDY MA VS. TOP CLASS ENTERPRISE INC., ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-06-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOP CLASS ENTERPRISE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SHIRLEY CHOW--OWNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TOP CLASS ENTERPRISE INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT TOP CLASS ENTERPRISE INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, CINDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOP CLASS ENTERPRISE INC. CHOW, SHIRLEY DBA TOP CLASS SHIRLEY CHOW DBA TOP CLASS AGREES TO BE ADDED TO THE COMPLAINT AS AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT AND WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,600.00 FILED BY MA, CINDY AS TO DEFENDANT TOP CLASS ENTERPRISE INC. CHOW, SHIRLEY DBA TOP CLASS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL *AGENT FOR SERVICE* FILED BY PLAINTIFF MA, CINDY AS TO DEFENDANT TOP CLASS ENTERPRISE INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - GRANTED JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-05-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2013 - JUDGMENT.
